The Jacket (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $6,301,131Details
International Box Office $9,151,847
Worldwide Box Office $15,452,978
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,723,682 (43.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.31 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:40.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,500,000 (worldwide box office is 0.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,331 opening theaters/1,331 max. theaters, 2.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $11,756,871

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 4th, 2005 (Wide) by Warner Independent
Video Release: February 14th, 2006 by Studio Distribution Services
MPA Rating: R for violence, language and brief sexuality/nudity.
Running Time: 103 minutes
Plot point: Accidental Death, Faulty Memory, Human Experimentation, Time Travel, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Mental Hospital
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Time period setting: 1990s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production Countries: United States
